outlook.volatilityExpectation: EXTREME: Total GEX -11.12B indicates dealers are heavily short gamma. Any directional move will be amplified by forced hedging. Expect 2-3x normal volatility.
outlook.summary: Spot at 645.09 sits precariously above the massive 640 RESONANCE support (108K+ monthly OI). Deeply negative GEX across all expirations creates unstable conditions. Monthly PCR at 3.76 signals extreme bearish positioning, while near-term reverse smirk (0.70 skew) suggests short-term bullish pressure. Critical inflection: if 640 breaks, negative gamma cascade targets 630. Max pain levels (657-674) provide upside magnets but require overcoming heavy call walls at 665-670.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE across all 3 expiries. Massive OI: 108,938 (Monthly) + 44,953 (Weekly) + 6,591 (0DTE). Primary structural support. Volume/OI ratio 8.9x in 0DTE indicates active defense. Break triggers gamma cascade.

Dominant CALL resistance across all expiries: 35,540 (W) + 13,908 (M) + 10,818 (0DTE). Primary upside cap. Monthly PUT OI 31,837 creates friction zone.
0DTE Max Pain level. Combined with Weekly (660) and Monthly (674) max pain creates magnetic zone. Near 655 PUT wall (15,766 OI 0DTE). Dealer target for expiry.
Monthly dominant PUT wall with 99,267 OI. Secondary support in Weekly (27,302) and 0DTE (8,960). If 640 breaks, this is next target. Deep value zone.
0DTE dominant CALL wall (12,215 OI) with Weekly confluence (8,805). High volume 31,141 in 0DTE. Near-term resistance before 670 major wall.

outlook.summary: Market trapped between strong PUT resonance support (6500-6400) and CALL confluence resistance (6700-6800). Spot hovering just 35 pts above critical 6500 support with massive put volume (128K) indicating aggressive hedging. Reverse smirk skew in short-term vs bearish smirk in monthly reveals timing divergence. Negative GEX environment favors volatility expansion. Max Pain at 6620 acts as upside magnet if 6500 support holds.
